title: casearia puberula
intro: Casearia puberula, also known as the "Climbing Casearia" or "Pulao", is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Casearia puberula include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
